member_descriptions: white horizontal-blind window, dark frame
member_long_descriptions: Interior window with closed white horizontal vinyl blinds filling the pane, set in a dark-painted wooden frame with dark curtains visible at the sides; slatted blinds are slightly uneven and the lower edge of the window is partially cropped by the image; light filters through the blinds creating diffuse brightness; estimated distance ~2.0 m from camera.
clusters.representative_description: Interior window with closed white horizontal vinyl blinds filling the pane, set in a dark-painted wooden frame with dark curtains visible at the sides; slatted blinds are slightly uneven and the lower edge of the window is partially cropped by the image; light filters through the blinds creating diffuse brightness; estimated distance ~2.0 m from camera.

member_descriptions: white ceiling fan partial close-up
white-and-brown ceiling fan edge-cropped
member_long_descriptions: Close-up partial view of a white ceiling fan showing a round central motor housing with three broad white blades; blades and housing are edge-cropped by the image border, exhibit soft shadows and slight blur, and appear to be photographed at close range (~0.8 m).

Partial close-up of a ceiling-mounted fan showing three visible blades with alternating white and dark brown (wood-tone) finishes around a round central metal/light hub; the fan is edge-cropped, slightly blurred, viewed from below, approximately 2.0 m from the camera.
clusters.representative_description: Close-up partial view of a white ceiling fan showing a round central motor housing with three broad white blades; blades and housing are edge-cropped by the image border, exhibit soft shadows and slight blur, and appear to be photographed at close range (~0.8 m).

member_descriptions: beige striped bedspread, dark footboard
member_long_descriptions: Close-up view of a bed showing a light beige/cream striped fabric bedspread draped over a dark polished wooden footboard; the image is a partial edge crop with top and bottom slightly cut off, seen from about 0.8 m away.
clusters.representative_description: Close-up view of a bed showing a light beige/cream striped fabric bedspread draped over a dark polished wooden footboard; the image is a partial edge crop with top and bottom slightly cut off, seen from about 0.8 m away.

member_descriptions: white-blind window with dark frame
member_long_descriptions: Tall rectangular interior window fitted with closed white horizontal blinds (plastic/vinyl); dark-painted frame and dark curtain panels are visible at the sides, slats mostly closed with faint daylight seeping through horizontal gaps, and the lower-right portion is slightly occluded by a piece of furniture — camera appears roughly 2.5 meters away.
clusters.representative_description: Tall rectangular interior window fitted with closed white horizontal blinds (plastic/vinyl); dark-painted frame and dark curtain panels are visible at the sides, slats mostly closed with faint daylight seeping through horizontal gaps, and the lower-right portion is slightly occluded by a piece of furniture — camera appears roughly 2.5 meters away.

member_descriptions: beige striped bed edge crop
member_long_descriptions: Partial view of a bed showing a beige-and-cream striped fabric bedspread draping over the mattress and a dark brown wooden footboard at the bottom; the object is edge-cropped and appears close to the camera (approx. 1.0 m).
clusters.representative_description: Partial view of a bed showing a beige-and-cream striped fabric bedspread draping over the mattress and a dark brown wooden footboard at the bottom; the object is edge-cropped and appears close to the camera (approx. 1.0 m).
